post.description:
Submit a new report. Requires authentication.

This endpoint allows users to submit traffic or incident reports.

There are two types of reports:

1. Standard Report:
- Requires location (latitude, longitude or area)
- Requires type, severity, and description

2. Checkpoint Status Report:
- Requires checkpointId and proposedCheckpointStatus
- Location is not required (derived automatically)

value.description: There is a roadblock on the main road near the city center

data.message: Report submitted successfully and is pending review. Thank you!
Report submitted successfully and is pending review. Thank you!

get.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of reports. Authentication is optional.
Moderators/Admins can filter by any status and see duplicates.
Regular users only see pending reports.

Get full details of a specific report by its ID.
Owners can see their rejected report's reason.
Moderators can see all reports regardless of status.

data.description: [SEED] Verified user report: full closure and turnback at Nablus south gate.

post.description:
Vote up or down on a pending report. 
Cannot vote on your own report or on duplicate reports.
After enough votes, the system may auto-verify or auto-reject.

patch.description:
Update your own pending report. Only the report owner can edit.
Cannot edit verified or rejected reports.
At least one field must be provided.

example.description: Updated description for the accident on the main road

patch.description:
Approve or reject a report. Requires Moderator or Admin role.
Cannot moderate duplicate reports — moderate the original instead.
Reason is required when rejecting.

post.description:
Create a new alert subscription for a specific area and category.
The user will receive alerts when incidents occur within the specified radius.
Categories: all, accident, traffic, closure.

get.description:
Get all alert subscriptions for the authenticated user.
Returns both active and inactive subscriptions ordered by creation date.

patch.description:
Update an existing active alert subscription.
Only the subscription owner can update it.
At least one field must be provided.

Deactivate an active alert subscription.
Deactivated subscriptions will no longer receive alerts.
Only the subscription owner can deactivate it.

get.description:
Get all alerts received by the authenticated user.
Includes incident details and subscription info for each alert.
Ordered by most recent first.

patch.description:
Mark a specific alert as read.
Only the alert owner can mark it as read.
Returns error if alert not found or already updated.

post.description:
This endpoint estimates routes between two locations within the West Bank, considering distance, duration, and delays from weather , checkpoints and incidents. 

It supports optional parameters to avoid specific areas or checkpoints. The system uses caching for performance and invalidates cache when related data changes.

A fallback mechanism ensures route estimation even if external services fail. Input validation is applied, and non-critical invalid inputs are gracefully ignored.

avoid_checkpoints.description: list of checkpoints ids to avoid

avoid_areas.description: list of area names to avoid

warnings: Checkpoint "Jenin East Arc Crossing" is closed
Checkpoint "Tulkarm Coastal Link Gate" is closed

post.description:
Compare multiple route scenarios between two points.
Each scenario can avoid different checkpoints or areas.
Returns sorted results by fastest final duration with a recommended scenario.

comparisons.name: normal
warnings: Checkpoint "Jenin East Arc Crossing" is closed
Checkpoint "Tulkarm Coastal Link Gate" is closed

comparisons.name: avoid checkpoint 6
warnings: Checkpoint "Bethlehem West Pass Point" is closed
Checkpoint "Jenin East Arc Crossing" is closed

comparisons.name: avoid tulkarm
warnings: Checkpoint "Bethlehem West Pass Point" is closed
Checkpoint "Jenin East Arc Crossing" is closed

get.description:
Retrieve the authenticated user's route history with pagination.

This endpoint returns previously estimated routes for the current user, including origin, destination, distance, base duration, final duration, total delay, fallback usage, and creation timestamp.

Retrieve a specific saved route from the authenticated user's route history by route ID.

This endpoint returns the route's origin, destination, distance, durations, delay, fallback status, and creation timestamp. The route must belong to the authenticated user.

delete.description:
Delete a specific route from the user's history by its ID.
Only the owner can delete their own route history entries.

get.description:
Retrieve summary statistics for the authenticated user's route history.

This endpoint returns aggregated route usage metrics, including total number of routes, total traveled distance, average delay time, fallback count, and the most frequently visited route.

Get the current risk status for all West Bank areas.
Status can be: clear, low_risk, moderate_risk, or high_risk.
Based on active checkpoints and incidents in each area.

Get all currently active checkpoints with their location and status.
Used to identify checkpoints that may affect route planning.

Get all currently active incidents with their location, type, and severity.
Used to identify incidents that may cause delays on routes.

post.description: Creates a new checkpoint. Prevents duplicate locations within the duplicate radius. ADMIN only.

get.description: Returns paginated checkpoints. Supports status, text search, and bounding-box filters.

parameters.description: Maximum latitude for bounding-box filter; must be greater than minLat.

parameters.name: maxLng
parameters.description: Maximum longitude for bounding-box filter; must be greater than minLng.

get.description: Returns checkpoints within a radius from a location; sorted by distance by default.
Returns a single checkpoint by ID.

patch.description: Updates checkpoint fields. latitude/longitude must be sent together. notes requires status in the same payload.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a checkpoint and records an audit log. ADMIN only.

get.description: Returns the audit trail of checkpoint status changes.

parameters.name: changedBy
parameters.description: Filter history by actor user UUID.

parameters.description: End of changed-at date-time range (ISO 8601); must be after fromDate.

patch.description: Updates only checkpoint status with optional moderation notes. Validates allowed status transitions.
